pr.title: Non-record: Negative Results — Architecture, TTT Variants, Quantization, and N-gram Cache Illegality

output.summary: Uses cosine-decay AdamW TTT adaptation then sliding-window multi-order n-gram cache with entropy-weighted interpolation on the LeakyReLU stack.
techniques: Cosine LR TTT adaptation with per-layer AdamW groups
Sliding-window eval with hashed multi-order n-gram backoff
Entropy-adaptive mixing of model and cache probabilities
